candidates.name: AnimeFacts API
candidates.tagline: The Anime Facts REST API serves fun facts about popular anime as JSON. List the
candidates.description: The Anime Facts REST API serves fun facts about popular anime as JSON. List the available anime, then fetch a set of facts for any of them - no API key, ideal for bots, widgets and learning projects.

candidates.name: Byabbe Wikipedia API
candidates.tagline: Byabbe's On This Day API returns historical events, births and deaths for any ca
candidates.description: Byabbe's On This Day API returns historical events, births and deaths for any calendar date as free JSON sourced from Wikipedia. No API key, no rate limits, CORS-ready.

candidates.name: Countries Now API
candidates.tagline: CountriesNow is a free, no-key API for country data - cities, states, population
candidates.description: CountriesNow is a free, no-key API for country data - cities, states, population, capitals, currencies, flags and dial codes - returned as JSON, ideal for forms, dashboards and lookups.

candidates.name: Deck of Cards API
candidates.tagline: Deck of Cards is a free, no-key API that shuffles a virtual deck and deals cards
candidates.description: Deck of Cards is a free, no-key API that shuffles a virtual deck and deals cards on demand. Create a deck, draw cards and read each card's value, suit and image URL as JSON.

candidates.name: DuckDuckGo Instant Answer API
candidates.tagline: The DuckDuckGo Instant Answer API returns the boxed answers you see above search
candidates.description: The DuckDuckGo Instant Answer API returns the boxed answers you see above search results - definitions, summaries, disambiguation and related topics - as JSON, with no API key.

candidates.name: FishWatch API
candidates.tagline: FishWatch is NOAA's free API of U.S. seafood species data - sustainability, habi
candidates.description: FishWatch is NOAA's free API of U.S. seafood species data - sustainability, habitat, nutrition, harvest and population details for fish and shellfish - returned as JSON with no API key.

candidates.name: Helium Blockchain API
candidates.tagline: Helium is a decentralized wireless network now running on Solana. Its legacy blo
candidates.description: Helium is a decentralized wireless network now running on Solana. Its legacy blockchain API is deprecated; hotspot, reward and token data is read through Solana and public data exports.

candidates.name: HTTP Cat API
candidates.tagline: http.cat pairs every HTTP status code with a cat picture. Request a code and get
candidates.description: http.cat pairs every HTTP status code with a cat picture. Request a code and get the matching image straight from a URL - no key, no setup - perfect for friendly error pages, docs and demos.

candidates.name: JSON Schema API
candidates.tagline: JSON Schema is an open standard for describing and validating the structure of J
candidates.description: JSON Schema is an open standard for describing and validating the structure of JSON data. You write a schema declaring types, required fields and constraints, then validate documents against it with any compliant library.

candidates.name: Magic: The Gathering API
candidates.tagline: The Magic: The Gathering API is a free, no-key database of MTG cards and sets. S
candidates.description: The Magic: The Gathering API is a free, no-key database of MTG cards and sets. Search cards by name, type, colour, set and more, and get full card details - mana cost, rules text, rarity and images - as JSON.

candidates.name: Met Museum API
candidates.tagline: The Met Museum Collection API opens The Metropolitan Museum of Art's collection
candidates.description: The Met Museum Collection API opens The Metropolitan Museum of Art's collection - hundreds of thousands of artworks with metadata and public-domain images - as JSON, with no API key.

candidates.name: Numbers API
candidates.tagline: The Numbers API turns any number or date into a short, readable fact - trivia, m
candidates.description: The Numbers API turns any number or date into a short, readable fact - trivia, math, year or date - returned as plain text or JSON, free and with no API key.

candidates.name: Open Food Facts API
candidates.tagline: Open Food Facts is a free, open database of food products worldwide. Its API tur
candidates.description: Open Food Facts is a free, open database of food products worldwide. Its API turns a barcode into ingredients, nutrition, Nutri-Score, allergens and images, with no API key.

candidates.name: OpenAPI Specification API
candidates.tagline: The OpenAPI Specification (OAS) is an open standard for describing REST APIs in
candidates.description: The OpenAPI Specification (OAS) is an open standard for describing REST APIs in a machine-readable YAML or JSON document, powering docs, code generation, mocks and testing.

candidates.name: OpenHands API
candidates.tagline: OpenHands (formerly OpenDevin) is an open-source platform for AI software-engine
candidates.description: OpenHands (formerly OpenDevin) is an open-source platform for AI software-engineering agents that write code, run commands and browse the web in a sandbox. Self-host it, or use OpenHands Cloud and its API.

candidates.name: PlaceBear API
candidates.tagline: Placebear is a free placeholder image service that returns a bear photo at any s
candidates.description: Placebear is a free placeholder image service that returns a bear photo at any size from a URL like placebear.com/600/400 - drop it straight into an img tag, no key or signup.

candidates.name: PlaceDog API
candidates.tagline: place.dog is a free placeholder image service that returns a dog photo at any si
candidates.description: place.dog is a free placeholder image service that returns a dog photo at any size from a URL like place.dog/600/400. No key, no setup - drop it into an img tag for mockups and demos.

candidates.name: PM2.5 Open Data
candidates.tagline: PM2.5 Open Data is a community air-quality feed (the LASS project) sharing readi
candidates.description: PM2.5 Open Data is a community air-quality feed (the LASS project) sharing readings from AirBox and government sensors as open JSON and CSV - particulate levels by station, with no API key.

candidates.name: Redoc API Documentation Tool
candidates.tagline: Redoc is an open-source API documentation tool from Redocly that renders an Open
candidates.description: Redoc is an open-source API documentation tool from Redocly that renders an OpenAPI document into a polished, readable three-panel reference site - an alternative to Swagger UI.

candidates.name: SHOUTCLOUD API
candidates.tagline: SHOUTCLOUD is a playful API with one job: it converts any text TO UPPERCASE. POS
candidates.description: SHOUTCLOUD is a playful API with one job: it converts any text TO UPPERCASE. POST a string and get the shouted version back as JSON - no key, no setup, a fun pick for demos and learning.

candidates.name: SpeechBrain API
candidates.tagline: SpeechBrain is an open-source PyTorch toolkit for speech - recognition, speaker
candidates.description: SpeechBrain is an open-source PyTorch toolkit for speech - recognition, speaker ID and diarization, enhancement and more - with pretrained models you run yourself or via hosted inference.

candidates.name: Temporal Workflow API
candidates.tagline: Temporal is a durable execution platform that runs your application code as reli
candidates.description: Temporal is a durable execution platform that runs your application code as reliable, long-running workflows - retrying, resuming and surviving failures - via SDKs for Go, Java, TypeScript, Python and .NET.

candidates.name: TimescaleDB API
candidates.tagline: TimescaleDB is an open-source PostgreSQL extension for time-series data. It adds
candidates.description: TimescaleDB is an open-source PostgreSQL extension for time-series data. It adds hypertables, continuous aggregates and compression to Postgres, so you store and query huge time-series with plain SQL.

candidates.name: Web3.js Ethereum API
candidates.tagline: web3.js is a JavaScript library for interacting with Ethereum and EVM chains. It
candidates.description: web3.js is a JavaScript library for interacting with Ethereum and EVM chains. It talks to a node over JSON-RPC so you can read blocks, query balances, send transactions and call smart contracts from JS.

candidates.name: Zoo Animals API
candidates.tagline: The Zoo Animals API returns random animals with fun facts - name, Latin name, ha
candidates.description: The Zoo Animals API returns random animals with fun facts - name, Latin name, habitat, diet, lifespan and an image - as JSON. Free and key-less, ideal for kids' apps, quizzes and learning projects.
